data.title: Small businesses are suing Trump admin over new tariffs. Legal group Liberty Justice Center represents, previously won against Trump's duties.
data.description: A legal group known as the Liberty Justice Center, which has previously challenged President Trump's duties, is representing the businesses.

data.title: Award-Winning Author Euran Daniels to Deliver Opening Keynote at International Nevus Outreach Conference, Unveiling New $100,000 Global Initiative to Advance CMN Research and Awareness
data.description: Renowned author, entrepreneur, and advocate for individuals with Congenital Melanocytic Nevus (CMN), Euran S. Daniels, is set to give the opening keynote speech at the upcoming 2026 Nevus Outreach International Conference in Orlando, Florida. The event is scheduled for Sunday, July 26, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. This conference aims to bring together individuals affected by CMN, with an expected audience of several hundred attendees. Daniels' address is highly anticipated and is set to inspire and empower those in the CMN community.

data.title: GENESIS HOUSE AND THE GOTHAM FILM & MEDIA INSTITUTE ANNOUNCE INAUGURAL SHORTS FELLOWSHIP WINNERS
data.description: Three promising young filmmakers named Shanice Brette, Annie Ning, and April Wen have been chosen for the Genesis House x The Gotham Shorts Fellowship. They will be mentored by established industry professionals Sean Wang, Raven Jackson, Josephine Decker, and Matthew Gross as they navigate the crucial production phase. This initiative, announced on July 24, 2026 in New York, aims to support new talent in the filmmaking industry.

data.title: STD Hero Showcases At Home STI Testing In New Orleans During Naughty N'awlins
data.description: A company is promoting at-home test kits for discreetly checking for STDs, food sensitivity, allergies, and Lyme Disease to reduce stigma around sexual health. The brand, STD Hero, showcased its testing kits at Naughty N'awlins event in New Orleans on July 24, 2026. The kits are part of the brand's efforts to promote self-testing and health awareness.

data.title: Indiana and Virginia Encourage a Speedy Way to Meet Rising Energy Demand
data.description: Legislation has been enacted to utilize the Surplus Interconnection Service, aiming to make electricity more cost-effective for the grid. The initiative, introduced on July 24, 2026, in Washington, involves Jenny Netherton, a key figure in The Pew Charitable Trusts' energy modernization program. Across the nation, decision-makers are seeking rapid solutions to facilitate the integration of affordable power onto the grid. The new laws focus on maximizing surplus power connections to drive down costs and improve accessibility. This project involves various stakeholders and aims to enhance energy efficiency and affordability by leveraging innovative strategies.

data.title: ActivatedYou by Maggie Q Launches Vital Strength, ActivatedYou's First Muscle-Supporting, Creatine Supplement: A Performance Formula for Lean Muscle, Recovery, and Total-Body Resilience
data.description: LOS ANGELES, July 24, 2026 - A new daily supplement has been introduced by the wellness brand ActivatedYou®, co-founded by actress and health advocate Maggie Q. The supplement combines Creatine Monohydrate, Essential Amino Acids, and Vitamin D3 to enhance strength, endurance, and muscle tone regardless of age. This unique blend aims to support overall fitness and health. The launch of this supplement signifies a step towards promoting wellness with key components that cater to various physiological needs.

data.title: POTOMAC BANCSHARES, INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
data.description: In Charles Town, West Virginia, on July 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of Potomac Bancshares, Inc. (OTCID: PTBS) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share on common stock at their July board meeting. Potomac Bancshares, Inc. serves as the bank holding company for Potomac Bank. This dividend declaration is part of the company's ongoing efforts to support its shareholders and maintain financial stability.

data.title: Gundry MD® Daily Weight Advantage™ Named Best Weight Management Supplement of 2026 by NutraIngredients-USA
data.description: Gundry MD® proudly announces that Daily Weight Advantage™, a softgel formula incorporating the body's fat-signaling hormones, has been awarded Product of the Year for its innovative, nature-aligned method of weight management. This achievement was celebrated on July 24, 2026, in Los Angeles.

data.title: In Celebration of National Tequila Day, Mission Craft Cocktails Debuts Its Newest Innovation: the Pickle-Rita 25%ABV
data.description: Celebrate National Tequila Day on July 24th with Mission Craft's new savory dill-infused margarita! The award-winning ready-to-drink cocktail collection will be expanding, with the new flavor hitting shelves at Total Wine & More, Costco, and Ralphs stores in Orange County, California this fall. Stay tuned for its debut and get ready to enjoy the unique taste.

data.title: BANKO OVERHEAD DOORS ACQUIRES SOUTHEASTERN GARAGE DOORS
data.description: TAMPA, Fla. - Banko Overhead Doors, part of the Blue Ridge Construction Capital Portfolio, has established a partnership with Southeastern Garage Doors in Charleston. This move signifies Banko's expansion into the South Carolina market. The agreement was finalized on July 24, 2026. Banko is recognized as a top provider of overhead doors in the Southeastern region.

data.title: Immigration Desk Shares Guidance for Entrepreneurs and Foreign Businesses Planning US Expansion in 2026
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, on July 24, 2026, Immigration Desk is emphasizing important immigration factors for entrepreneurs, investors, and foreign-owned businesses aiming to establish or grow operations in the United States. As interest in global expansion persists, the guidance is crucial for those seeking opportunities in the country.

data.title: Society of Hematologic Oncology launches 2nd podcast focused on educational content in hematologic malignancies
data.description: A new educational podcast called SOHO Spotlight has been introduced, with a focus on providing practical advice and strategies for managing hematologic malignancies. The Society of Hematologic Oncology (SOHO) recently revealed the launch of its second podcast, SOHO Spotlight. This podcast aims to offer insights and tips on managing hematologic malignancies. This news was announced on July 24, 2026, in Los Angeles.

data.title: FEDERAL HOME LOAN BANK OF BOSTON ANNOUNCES 2026 SECOND QUARTER RESULTS, DECLARES DIVIDEND
data.description: On July 24, 2026, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston released its preliminary, unaudited financial results for the second quarter of 2026. The Bank reported a net income of $45.2 million for the quarter. It anticipates submitting its quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the period soon.

A value investor is getting paid to maybe own SpaceX. Duan Yongping sold puts on newly public SpaceX, collecting about $2.32M on 1,000 contracts, his classic "happy to take delivery" play. The 5-month puts carry an ~25% yield, about 60% annualized. His reason: "supporting Musk's dream." $SPCX
